case_title: T. AND G. SWEEPERS VS. WALGREENS CO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-01-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF T. AND G. SWEEPERS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WALGREENS CO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CSC - LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF T. AND G. SWEEPERS AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREENS CO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF T. AND G. SWEEPERS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-17-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREENS CO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY T. AND G. SWEEPERS AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREENS CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WALGREENS CO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY TURHAN BURTON--SUPERVISOR HUSBAND. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY BAILOW YU--DISTRICT MANAGER AND KEN TU--STORE MANAGER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
